title: Quanquer Shooting Game Targets Kids Boys Toys for Nerf Guns - Zombie Shooting Target with Net Indoor Outdoor Garden Toys Birthday Gifts for 5 6 7 8 9 10+ Years Old Boys Girls
features: 🎯Unique Zombie Shooting Targets Game: This shooting target is made of high-quality ABS materials with net, compatible with foam balls and even bean bag. It comes with 1* zombies shooting target, 2* support rods, 4* windproof spikes. Please note that this item does NOT include any toy guns or foam bullets

🧿Quick setup and easy to store: Set-up is so easy, just "pop-up", and then put the two poles for stability and 4 stakes to keep the kids toys from blowing away for outdoor use. Easily folds down for storage and it doesn’t require big space to place it.

🎱Fun and Practical: The zombie shooting targets are good sized and the net in the back makes capturing the darts very easy if you hit the scoring pocket, so the bullets will not fly everywhere anymore and save a lot of your cleaning time. Parent can also give prizes for the one who gets the most bullets in catch all net, it will add more fun for your family time.

🪃Boredom lifesaver: If you have a Nerf-obsessed little boy, get this zombie shooting targets game toy! They will spend all their time shooting the target instead of each other. It is the best choice of shooting nerf guns toys for boys and girls age 5 6 7 8 9 10 11 12+ Years Old on their Birthday, Children's Day, Thanksgiving Day, Halloween, and Christmas.

🟢Perfect gift the kids: It's good for kids hand eye coordination. This zombie shooting target would be a fun challenge for child to better practice his precision. Just teach them to aim properly and this target will catch the bullets.
description: Product Description NOTE: THIS SHOOTING TARGET FOR NERF GUNS NOT COME WITH ANY TOY BLASTER GUNS HIGH QUALITY RODS FOR STABILITY Removable rods with three-section folding design, easy for installation and storage, just fold it when you storage, doesn’t take any your place. Let’s Enjoy the Super Fun Shooting Game Challenge! Compared with other products, our shooting game toy made with safe and high quality materials, will prove to be durable and long-lasting.
